title: Security Analyst
description: We are seeking a Security Analyst to monitor, analyze, and respond to security incidents. You will work with advanced tools and methodologies to protect our clients' critical infrastructure.
requirements: Strong knowledge of SIEM tools and incident response
Experience with threat hunting and analysis

title: Penetration Tester
description: We are seeking a Penetration Tester to identify vulnerabilities in client systems and applications. You will conduct authorized security assessments and provide detailed remediation guidance.
requirements: Proficiency in manual and automated testing techniques
Experience with web, network, and mobile application testing

title: Cryptographic Researcher
description: We are seeking a Cryptographic Researcher to advance our understanding of modern cryptographic systems. You will analyze implementations, identify weaknesses, and develop novel approaches to secure communications.
requirements: PhD or equivalent experience in cryptography or mathematics
Ability to work on sensitive projects
